issue_summary: Add methods to handle filename prefixes
javadoc_before:
/** * Utility class that provides methods to manipulate filenames and filepaths. *

* This class defines four basic components within a filename (example C:\dev\project\file.txt): *

    *
  • the prefix - C:\ *
  • the path - dev\project *
  • the name - file.txt *
  • the extension - txt *
* The class only supports Unix and Windows style names. * *

Path-related methods

* *

Methods exist to retrieve the components of a typical file path. For * example /www/hosted/mysite/index.html, can be broken into: *

    *
  • /www/hosted/mysite/ -- retrievable through * {@link #getPath}
    • *
  • index.html -- retrievable through {@link #removePath}
    • *
  • /www/hosted/mysite/index -- retrievable through * {@link #removeExtension}
    • *
  • html -- retrievable through {@link #getExtension}
    • *
* There are also methods to {@link #catPath concatenate two paths}, * {@link #resolveFile resolve a path relative to a File} and * {@link #normalize} a path. *

* *

Origin of code

*
    *
  • commons-utils repo
    • *
  • Alexandria's FileUtils.
    • *
  • Avalon Excalibur's IO.
    • *
* * @author Kevin A. Burton * @author Scott Sanders * @author Daniel Rall * @author Christoph.Reck * @author Peter Donald * @author Jeff Turner * @author Matthew Hawthorne * @author Martin Cooper * @author Jeremias Maerki * @author Stephen Colebourne * @version $Id: FilenameUtils.java,v 1.26 2004/11/22 01:11:55 scolebourne Exp $ * @since Commons IO 1.1 */
javadoc_after:
/** * Utility class that provides methods to manipulate filenames and filepaths. *

* This class defines six components within a filename (example C:\dev\project\file.txt): *

    *
  • the prefix - C:\
    • *
  • the path - dev\project
    • *
  • the full path - C:\dev\project
    • *
  • the name - file.txt
    • *
  • the base name - file
    • *
  • the extension - txt
    • *
* The class only supports Unix and Windows style names. *

*

Origin of code

*
    *
  • Commons Utils
    • *
  • Alexandria's FileUtils
    • *
  • Avalon Excalibur's IO
    • *
* * @author Kevin A. Burton * @author Scott Sanders * @author Daniel Rall * @author Christoph.Reck * @author Peter Donald * @author Jeff Turner * @author Matthew Hawthorne * @author Martin Cooper * @author Jeremias Maerki * @author Stephen Colebourne * @version $Id: FilenameUtils.java,v 1.27 2004/11/23 00:04:29 scolebourne Exp $ * @since Commons IO 1.1 */
